title: INNARDS' Southern Pack
description: Adds SR locos to Immersive Railroading
body:
Adds locomotives from the UK's Southern Railway to the Immersive Railroading mod.
This resource pack requires the Immersive Railroading mod and its associated dependencies.
Adds
From the London, Brighton and South Coast Railway:
- A1
- A1x
From the London, Dover and Chatham Railway
- "Europa" Class
From the South Eastern and Chatham Railway
- C Class
- D Class
- H Class
- P Class
- O1 Class
